name: Chimairamon

signature_move.name: Heat Viper
signature_move.description: 12Shoots heat rays in every direction from its four hands.Shoots a heat ray from its mouth.

description: A Composite Digimon for which each part that composes its whole, such as its arms, legs, body, and tail, was put together by synthesizing various Digimon. How this kind of synthesis was performed is shrouded in mystery. In contrast to Mugendramon , who was synthesized from the metal parts of several varieties of Digimon, it was combined from organic parts, and whether it is Mugendramon's prototype , or it was built to use against Mugendramon, is still uncertain. However, the one thing that is known is that, because of Chimairamon's terrifying combat instinct, it is nothing but a powerful force for destruction. The deadly heat ray it emanates from its four arms is " Heat Viper ". Getting hit by this heat ray is like Chimairamon's curse, a terrifying technique which is cruelly dispersed in every direction.
